infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TechieFinder needs access to your camera to upload portfolio photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TechieFinder needs access to your photos to upload portfolio images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TechieFinder needs your location to find technicians near you and to let technicians set their service area.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: TechieFinder needs your location to find technicians near you and to let technicians set their service area.

plugins.faceIDPermission: TechieFinder uses Face ID to let you unlock the app quickly instead of typing your password.
